description_long: This is a heavy, wooden baseball bat with a dark, weathered finish and a slightly tapered cylindrical shape. The bat is reinforced with numerous large, metallic spikes protruding from the barrel, giving it a menacing, improvised weapon appearance. The wood shows signs of wear, scratches, and discoloration, suggesting extensive use or intentional distressing. The handle is smooth and lacks any grip tape, ending in a rounded knob for secure handling. The metallic spikes are irregularly spaced and vary in length, with some appearing rusted or aged. There are no visible brand logos, markings, or decorative elements on the bat, and the end cap is simply the rounded end of the wood.
description: A dark, weathered wooden baseball bat with large metal spikes protruding from the barrel, giving it a rugged, improvised weapon look. The handle is smooth and unadorned, with no visible logos or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bat, with several metal spikes clearly visible protruding from the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staggered arrangement of the spikes and the smooth, unwrapped handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the alignment of the spikes along the barrel and the rounded end of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the distribution of spikes and the unmarked, dark wood surface.
